title: Re-queen a honey bee colony
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Re-queen a honey bee colony demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify requirements for re-queening a colony

pcs.text: Assess the current queen performance against workplace specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the current queen performance against workplace specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the current queen performance against workplace specifications.

pcs.text: Monitor colony for signs that indicate queen replacement is necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor colony for signs that indicate queen replacement is necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor colony for signs that indicate queen replacement is necessary.

pcs.text: Determine the need and method for re-queening
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need and method for re-queening?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need and method for re-queening.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify requirements for re-queening a colony

elements.title: Prepare to re-queen a colony

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment required for re-queening operations and ensure serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment required for re-queening operations and ensure serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required for re-queening operations and ensure serviceability.

pcs.text: Identify and obtain replacement queen to meet workplace specifications and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and obtain replacement queen to meet workplace specifications and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and obtain replacement queen to meet workplace specifications and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Store replacement queen and escort worker bees in appropriate conditions and monitor until re-queening is undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store replacement queen and escort worker bees in appropriate conditions and monitor until re-queening is undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store replacement queen and escort worker bees in appropriate conditions and monitor until re-queening is undertaken.

pcs.text: Assess the condition and health of replacement queen
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the condition and health of replacement queen?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the condition and health of replacement queen.

pcs.text: Monitor hive condition and environment to ensure re-queening occurs under optimum conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor hive condition and environment to ensure re-queening occurs under optimum conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor hive condition and environment to ensure re-queening occurs under optimum conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare to re-queen a colony

elements.title: Introduce replacement queen bee

pcs.text: Open hive and conduct manipulations re-queening operations according to method selected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open hive and conduct manipulations re-queening operations according to method selected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open hive and conduct manipulations re-queening operations according to method selected.

pcs.text: Locate queen bee to be replaced in the hive and remove
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate queen bee to be replaced in the hive and remove?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate queen bee to be replaced in the hive and remove.

pcs.text: Introduce queen to hive according to selected method and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Introduce queen to hive according to selected method and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Introduce queen to hive according to selected method and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Allow time for queen and colony to adjust and stabilise according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow time for queen and colony to adjust and stabilise according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow time for queen and colony to adjust and stabilise according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Introduce replacement queen bee

elements.title: Monitor progress of a replacement queen bee

pcs.text: Monitor the hive for acceptance of replacement queen bee by colony according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the hive for acceptance of replacement queen bee by colony according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the hive for acceptance of replacement queen bee by colony according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor replacement queen bee for evidence of egg laying and adequate levels of hatching
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor replacement queen bee for evidence of egg laying and adequate levels of hatching?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor replacement queen bee for evidence of egg laying and adequate levels of hatching.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor progress of a replacement queen bee

elements.title: Update and maintain apiary records

pcs.text: Confirm legislative and workplace procedures for record keeping

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm legislative and workplace procedures for record keeping.

pcs.text: Update apiary records for re-queening activities according to workplace procedures, legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update apiary records for re-queening activities according to workplace procedures, legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update apiary records for re-queening activities according to workplace procedures, legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements.
